# Minicuration

Minicuration produces museum-quality reproductions of original paintings on 2.5×3.5-inch trading cards (ACEO format), limited to exactly 50 numbered editions per design and sealed in a magnetic acrylic display case with a standing easel included. Every print reproduces a hand-painted original in oil, acrylic, or mixed media by independent artists. The back of each card carries the artist name, medium, edition number, and the artist's own statement about the work. All prints are $45 USD. Current artist: JFeelgood (https://jfeelgood.com).

## Key URLs

- Homepage: https://minicuration.com/
- Shop (all 14 designs): https://minicuration.com/shop.html
- About: https://minicuration.com/about.html
- Artist — JFeelgood: https://minicuration.com/artists/jfeelgood.html

- Dreamfall: https://minicuration.com/shop/dreamfall.html
- Dream Mountain: https://minicuration.com/shop/dream-mountain.html
- Sky Miles: https://minicuration.com/shop/sky-miles.html

- A Simple Meditation: https://minicuration.com/shop/a-simple-meditation.html
- Sisters: https://minicuration.com/shop/sisters.html
- Sentiments: https://minicuration.com/shop/sentiments.html
- Transcend: https://minicuration.com/shop/transcend.html
- Veritas: https://minicuration.com/shop/veritas.html
- Serenade: https://minicuration.com/shop/serenade.html
- Worth The Trip: https://minicuration.com/shop/worth-the-trip.html
- Vicarious: https://minicuration.com/shop/vicarious.html
- Crowned: https://minicuration.com/shop/crowned.html
- Sweet Dreams: https://minicuration.com/shop/sweet-dreams.html

## What makes Minicuration distinct

- Trading card size (2.5×3.5 inches) — fits in a wallet, pocket, or display stand
- Strictly 50 numbered prints per design; no reprints
- Each card ships sealed in a magnetic acrylic collector's case with a display stand
- Reproduces original paintings, not digital art — every print has a physical source work
- Artist statement on the back of every card
- Connects collectors directly to independent artists via affordable, physical collectibles
- Sister sites: https://jfeelgood.com and https://iexploreart.com
